# Vendored Mintlify Components

Source: https://github.com/mintlify/components

Vendoring date: 2026-05-03

Original commit: `e673006e1eb3f87fe25006aa3564b3ff0f2a8803`

License: MIT, preserved in `LICENSE`.

Copied runtime source for the initial gitcms MDX component registry:

- `components/accordion`
- `components/callout`
- `components/card`
- `components/code-block`
- `components/code-group`
- `components/icon`
- `components/steps`
- `components/tabs`
- shared `constants`, `hooks`, `icons`, `plugins`, `utils`
- `styles.css`, `code.css`, `twoslash.css`

Modifications from upstream source: none to runtime component behavior. Storybook-only files were omitted from the vendored runtime payload.
